raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Weens Balknis irr dsirdehts
eelsch Rahnas/ weena Noscheh-
loſchana un gauscha Raudafcha-
na/ Raële rand pahr faweem
Behrneem / winna ne taujahs
eepreezinatces pahr faweem Behr-
neem/ ka tee newa wairs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Taſakka tas KUNGS:
Atrauji tawn Balti no Rauda-
tchanas/ un tawas Azzis no Af-
farahm/ jo ta Alga irr tur
preekſch tawa Darba/ fakka tas
KUNGS : Jo tee atgreeſifees
no ta Eenadneeka Semmes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kas pehz tewim buhs/
teem irr (dauds Labbuma)
jagaida/ fakka tas KUNGS:
Jo tawi Behrni nahks attak us
fawahm Rohbeschahm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es eſmu klaufht klan-
sijs/ ka Getvraims ſchehlojahs/
tu eſſi manni pahrmahzijs / un
eſ eſmu pahrmahzihts / ka ne-
apradde Tetsch. Atgreeſimani/
tad tapſchu es atgreeſts. Jo
tu eſſi tas KUNGS mans
Deews.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Teescham/ pehz kad es at-
greeſts tappu/ tad nahze man
Noschehlungs/ un pehz kad es to
eſmu tajuttis/ tad fischu es us
manneem Gurneem/ jo es eſmu
apkaunohts/ un Rauna tappis/
pazeesdams to Neewaschunu
mannas Jaunibas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Neg Getvraims man irr
weens dahrgs Dehis/ un weens
dischans Behrns? Jo kamehr es
us winnu eſmu runnajs / pee-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "tapetz truhſt manna Sir-
pahr winnu/ es apschehledame
pahr winnu apschehloſchohe
fakka tas KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Uezelli preekſch tevw
Rappu-Sihnes/ leez teuw Ru-
tuma-Mehrkus / un leez tar
Sirđi us to staigatu Zelftu/
tu eſſi staigajs/ atgreeſees af
fraeta Jumprawa ! atgreeſe
uhsſcheem taweem Pilſtahteer
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Zik ilgi tu maldiſees/
atlahpaja Meita ? Jo t
KUNGS irr weenu januu E
tu raddijs wirs Semmes / w
naSeewifchka apdohe toWih
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Taſakka tas KURG
Zebnot / tas Israēta Dee-
Scho Wahrdü tee wehl runna
eekſch tahs Semmes Juha/
winnas Pilſfahtōs/ kad es w
na Zeetumu atgreeſitchu. Lat
KUNGS teewi fwehti/ tu Ma-
jas-Weeta tahs Taſnibas/
fwehts Kalns.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Juha ar wiﬀe
winnas Pilſfahteein dſihtve
eekſch tahs kohpā/ tee Arra-
un kas ar gannaineem Pulke-
staiga.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo es peedfirinaſchu
peekuffſchu Dwehfeli / un
ditchu ikkatru noskummuf
Dwehfelt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Us to es uhsſmohdo
un peeraudſiju/ un mans Me-
bija man garde.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rangi/ tahs Dee-
nahks/ fakka tas KUNGS:
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
